name: Feeder
description:
Library component. The continuation feeder -- dispatches slings to issues and polecats in non-deterministic order. Two-lane capacity. Each dispatch fires the issue's SLING and the polecat's SLING atomically (via raise) so a lane gets both ends of its work assignment in one transition. The polecat-channel-driven advance path is option C (existing in Polecat as of v0.2.1); pre-v0.2 Feeder fanned a single port to two recipients which produced TLC UNCHANGED warnings -- this version sends explicitly to four ports.

Observes convoy state to know when to start dispatching.

SLING1_POL.description: sling to lane 1's Polecat (atomic with SLING1_ISSUE via raise). Tagged 'Sling'.

SLING2_POL.description: sling to lane 2's Polecat (atomic with SLING2_ISSUE via raise). Tagged 'Sling'.

CONVOY_OBSERVE.description: observes convoy state. Dispatching starts when convoy = Open.

actors.name: Feeder
actors.owner: Parallel feeder. Non-deterministic dispatch order. Each step is an atomic two-port send (issue + polecat) to one lane.
